mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_NICKNAME = #{userNickname}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_PHONE_NUM = #{userPhoneNum}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TBL_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER ( USER_NO, USER_NAME, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_BIRTH, USER_EMAIL, USER_TYPE, USER_STATUS, USER_NICKNAME, USER_PHONE_NUM ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{userId}, #{userPw}, TO_DATE(#{userBirth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{userEmail}, 1, 1, #{userNickname}, #{userPhoneNum} )

SELECT SEQ_TBL_ORGAN_CERT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_ORGAN_CERT ( ORGAN_CERT_NO, USER_NO, ORGAN_NO, ORGAN_FILE_SYSTEM_NAME, ORGAN_FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME ) VALUES ( #{organCertNo}, #{userNo}, #{organNo}, #{organFileSystemName}, #{organFileOriginalName} )

SELECT SEQ_TBL_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER ( USER_NO, USER_NAME, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_BIRTH, USER_EMAIL, USER_TYPE, USER_STATUS, ORGAN_NAME, ORGAN_NO ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{userId}, #{userPw}, TO_DATE(#{userBirth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{userEmail}, 2, 2, #{organName}, #{organNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_no, user_nickname, user_type FROM tbl_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_pw = #{userPw} AND user_status = 1

SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_EMAIL, USER_STATUS FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_NAME = #{userName} AND USER_BIRTH = #{userBirth} AND USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail} AND USER_STATUS = 1
